summary: Full testing of Settings feature (/ajustes): Language, Currency, Theme, Export. All 4 sections loaded. Theme changes work with correct CSS vars. Language nav updates work. Backend export APIs (CSV/JSON) working. Sidebar active state working.

integration_issues.issue: When switching to USD, the amounts still show with '$' symbol (same as MXN). The Intl.NumberFormat for en-US+USD produces '$50,000' which looks identical to MXN. The currency code 'USD'/'MXN' isn't shown inline. Minor UX - users can't visually distinguish currency change without a label.

action_items: Optional: Consider showing currency code (MXN/USD) alongside amounts so users can confirm active currency
critical_code_review_comments: Settings page h1 returns 'Eventos' when querying 'h1' selector - sidebar app title also uses h1 tag, causing selector ambiguity. Minor testability issue.
Language change does not update the page h1 text dynamically (the Settings page heading stays 'Ajustes'/'Settings' but test selector matched sidebar h1 'Eventos')

features_tested.settings_page_loads: PASS - 4 sections visible: Idioma, Moneda, Colores del Tema, Exportar Datos
features_tested.lang_en_nav_change: PASS - Nav shows Reservations, Settings after EN selected
features_tested.lang_es_nav_restore: PASS - Nav shows Reservaciones, Ajustes after ES selected
features_tested.currency_buttons: PASS - All 6 currency buttons visible (MXN, USD, EUR, COP, ARS, CLP)
features_tested.theme_persistence: PASS - CSS vars persist after navigating to Dashboard
features_tested.sidebar_active_ajustes: PASS - nav-ajustes has nav-active class on /ajustes page
features_tested.export_csv_api: PASS - /api/export/reservations?format=csv returns valid CSV with correct headers
features_tested.export_buttons_visible: PASS - export-csv-btn and export-json-btn both visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings feature fully implemented and working. Theme uses CSS vars via applyThemeVars(). Language stored in localStorage 'lang'. Currency stored as 'currency'. Theme stored as 'theme'. Export APIs at /api/export/reservations?format=csv|json. All data-testids present: lang-es, lang-en, currency-MXN/USD/EUR/COP/ARS/CLP, theme-indigo/rose/amber/emerald/sky/slate, export-csv-btn, export-json-btn, nav-ajustes.
